title: Decouple live report publication from collector compute
evidence: GitHub pull request and commit history
claim_boundary: Repository design and planning code were merged; Azure authentication, deployment, RBAC mutation, report publication, and frontend verification were not established.

title: Promote read-only report publication planner
evidence: GitHub pull request, commit, CI, and later workflow evidence
claim_boundary: The read-only planner workflow was promoted. Promotion did not itself prove a dispatch, current Azure evidence, or deployment authority.

title: Repair read-only planner RBAC evidence capture
evidence: GitHub pull request, commit, CI, and later workflow evidence
claim_boundary: Repository repair was merged; no Azure mutation was authorized or performed.

title: Use ProviderNoRbac for read-only ARM planning
evidence: GitHub pull request, commit, CI, and later workflow evidence
claim_boundary: ProviderNoRbac enabled least-privilege planning; it did not grant role-assignment write permission or deployment authority.

title: Use Blob endpoint for browser report CORS
evidence: GitHub pull request and commit history plus later read-only planner evidence
claim_boundary: The browser endpoint architecture was corrected in code; no Storage deployment, publication, or browser verification was established by the merge.

title: Promote bounded live report publication
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, and commit history
claim_boundary: The execution workflow was merged but not dispatched; no Azure deployment, RBAC mutation, report publication, or browser proof was established.

title: chore: reconcile merged publication project state
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, and commit history
claim_boundary: Project state was reconciled; no workflow dispatch or Azure action was performed.

title: Repin live publication to planner run 29979955391
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, commit history, and protected planner evidence metadata
claim_boundary: The workflow pin was updated; no execution dispatch, Azure mutation, publication, or browser proof was established.

title: Add read-only publication predeployment readiness
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, and commit history
claim_boundary: The readiness workflow was merged but not dispatched; it established no current readiness result or Azure authority.

title: Deploy demo backends and connect frontend API
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, and commit history
claim_boundary: The scoped demo-backend/API implementation and workflow were merged. No scoped What-If, Azure deployment, listener verification, API verification, or frontend live rendering was established.

title: Reconcile PR46 merge project state
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, commit history, and user-provided merge screenshot
claim_boundary: Repository coordination state was reconciled. No workflow dispatch, Azure access, Azure mutation, deployment, or service verification was established.

title: Separate durable history from live repository state
evidence: GitHub pull request and commit history
claim_boundary: The repository state model was corrected so durable history is not presented as live GitHub or Azure truth. The merge established no Azure action or service validation.

title: Parse Azure What-If pretty output safely
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, and repository history
claim_boundary: The classifier learned to parse JSON or Azure CLI pretty What-If output. The merge did not prove a new dispatch, Azure deployment, or service validation.

title: Add deployment-readiness evidence to the demo workflow
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, and repository history
claim_boundary: The workflow gained subscription, resource-group, SKU, quota, policy, RBAC, deny-assignment, lock, and retail-price evidence capture. Repository implementation did not establish current readiness or authorize deployment.

title: Allow only proven backend NIC What-If noise
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, captured What-If replay, and repository history
claim_boundary: Only the exact observed VPN-backend NIC default-property noise was permitted. The merge did not authorize or perform Azure mutation.

title: Host the demo API on the existing collector VM
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, and repository history
claim_boundary: The active Microsoft.Web path was retired and replaced by a private collector plus bounded load-balanced ingress design. The merge did not prove readiness, ARM What-If, Azure deployment, TLS, API health, or frontend operation.

title: Normalize Azure public IP quota evidence
evidence: GitHub pull request, exact-head CI, downloaded run replay, and repository history
claim_boundary: The readiness gate now normalizes non-negative whole-number quota strings and preserves raw types while remaining fail-closed. The merge does not prove that a fresh workflow dispatch occurred or that ARM What-If, deployment, TLS, API health, or frontend operation succeeded.
